name: Greek Lemon Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium skinless boneless chicken breast halves (about 6 ounces)
1 medium carrot, peeled and cut into 2-inch pieces
1 medium celery stalk, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, heat chicken broth, chicken breast, onion studded with cloves, carrot, celery and 2-1/2 cups water to boiling over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer until rice is tender (15 - 20 minutes).
3. Remove chicken and vegetables from the saucepan using a slotted spoon; discard vegetables.
4. Cool chicken until easy to handle, then shred into thin strips; set aside.
5. In a large bowl, mix eggs and lemon juice with a wire whisk until combined.
6. Slowly whisk 2 cups simmering broth into the egg mixture in the bowl, whisking constantly.
7. Return broth mixture to saucepan; heat just to simmering (whisking constantly) about 5 minutes. Do not boil or soup will curdle.
8. Stir in shredded chicken and margarine or butter.
9. Sprinkle with chopped chives before serving. Makes about 7 cups, which serves 6 as a first course.
